mapper.select: SELECT id, menu_name, menu_code, parent_id, menu_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_order, is_visible, permission_code, report_id, create_time, update_time FROM sys_menu ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, menu_name, menu_code, parent_id, menu_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_order, is_visible, permission_code, report_id, create_time, update_time FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, menu_name, menu_code, parent_id, menu_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_order, is_visible, permission_code, report_id, create_time, update_time FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_visible = #{isVisible} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (menu_name, menu_code, parent_id, menu_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_order, is_visible, permission_code, report_id, create_time) VALUES (#{menuName}, #{menuCode}, #{parentId}, #{menuType}, #{routePath}, #{componentPath}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{permissionCode}, #{reportId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
